summary: Closed SIM-006 after PR #20 merged into main. The reviewed Content Compiler v0, synthetic 30-node/60-edge fixture, runtime content pack parser/index, and CLI validator implementation is integrated at main merge commit a1b0471e91612362165dad40447a597630902bbb, and the dependency-ready follow-up task on this branch is SIM-005.

tests_run.result: PR #20 MERGED at 2026-06-24T09:08:16Z with merge commit a1b0471e91612362165dad40447a597630902bbb; Quality/Web and Windows Desktop Smoke checks both succeeded.
SIM-006 merge commit is an ancestor of origin/main.
SIM-006 was ACCEPTED on main before closure; after this closure branch it is CLOSED.

decisions: Close SIM-006 only after confirming the accepted implementation entered main through PR #20.
Do not start SIM-005 in this closure commit.
risks: Content-runtime is intentionally not wired into sim-core in SIM-006 because sim-core was outside the allowed paths; later integration should add contract tests at the sim-core boot boundary.
requested_action: After this closure commit is integrated, continue M1 autonomous execution by selecting the dependency-ready next task.
